ResourceHeader.ResourceName: NASA THEMIS EPO Pine Ridge Station

RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description:
Pine Ridge (PINE) station is located in Pine Ridge, South Dakota, USA.  This station has an Educational Public Outreach magnetometer operated by UCLA.  EPO magnetometers should be used carefully, as they may be subject to environmental noise.
Magnetic Latitude: 52.25
Magnetic Longitude: 323.28
UT of Magnetic Midnight: 7.1333
Magnetic Declination: 8.27
Magnetic coordinates obtained by calculation using the CGM online calculator with IGRF 2008 at altitude of 0 km. Magnetic declination obtained using CGM online calculator with IGRF 2007.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: We acknowledge NASA contract NAS5-02099 and V. Angelopoulos for use of data from the THEMIS Mission. Specifically:S. Mende and C. T. Russell for use of the GMAG data
